info.description: Provides versioned Dev API routes for Agent Platform runtime/control/test orchestration. Designed for backend-first API consumption and ADE frontend integration.
info.summary: Runtime and control APIs for local Agent Platform development
info.title: Agent Platform Dev API

get.description: List existing agents so the UI can pull and inspect prior state.

Returns persisted state from Letta backend storage (Postgres/pgvector via Letta API):
- agent metadata
- memory blocks
- attached tools
- persisted conversation history

post.summary: Send runtime message with optional overrides
Invoke a runtime message to validate tool-call behavior
